---
title: "MAD213 Basic Statistics, Week 06" 
description: "Lecture: Standard Normal Distributions, z-score tables"
date: 2020-11-13T08:00:00-03:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: []
comments: false
---

Dear all,

Lecture notes are available [here.](/upload/mad213t_w05_nov13.pdf) 

Good luck,

`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC `r emo::ji("bar_chart")`
